official_title: Ley de los Sistemas de Ahorro para el Retiro
publisher: Cámara de Diputados del H. Congreso de la Unión

known_stale_citations.note: Cites LMV's 1975-vintage 'Artículo 16 Bis' series (información privilegiada); the modern LMV, fully rewritten 2005-12-30, has no such articles. LSAR's article 68 was never updated when LMV was replaced.
